name: PhilateLister stamp catalog
author: Exergy ∞ LLC
description: Entity shard: thematic or topical classification tag.

entities.name: thematic_tag
entities.description: Normalized tags for ships, royalty, Olympics, etc.; optional parent builds a shallow hierarchy.

fields.name: tag_id
fields.description: Stable slug for the tag (e.g. topical-ships, royalty-crowns).

fields.name: name
fields.description: Short label shown in filters and listings.

fields.name: description
fields.description: What designs or subjects belong under this tag.
